Describe the sequence of jewelry pouches and accessories displayed on the table throughout the clip.
canonical_answer: At 2s, a coral pouch sits beside a gold bracelet with a turquoise stone; at 4s, hands hold a red leather pouch with pink ribbons; at 10s, a teal velvet pouch is handled near perfume bottles and a Boss bracelet; at 14s, three pouches including leopard print are arranged in a row on the table.

question: Walk through the specific text and product details visible on screen during the video.
canonical_answer: At 2s, gold script on a dark box reads Le Bain; at 8s, a product page shows Jewelry Pouch priced at $ 75.00 with an Add To Shopping Bag button; at 10s, white letter beads on a bracelet spell Boss; at 18s, a title card displays Diy Jewelry Pouch with a sun icon.
